# Reportify AI

> Reportify AI generates professional business reports, market analyses, and financial documents using AI.
> The RIE (Reportify Intelligence Engine) transforms messy meeting notes, chat logs, and quick thoughts into executive-level Word documents, PPT decks, and email summaries in under 30 seconds.

## Core Features

- AI Report Generator - Create daily/weekly reports from raw notes
- Meeting Notes to Report - Convert messy meeting notes into structured documents
- One-Click PPT Generation - Turn any report into a presentation-ready slide deck
- Email Summary Drafts - Generate concise stakeholder email summaries
- Multiple Export Formats - Word (.doc), PPT, Markdown, Email
- Multi-Language Support - English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, German, French, Portuguese
- RIE 3.0 Flagship Engine - Advanced AI that understands corporate hierarchy and professional communication logic
- Daily Blog & News - AI-curated content on productivity, PM workflows, and tech radar

## Pricing

- **Elite Trial**: Free for 7 days, full RIE 3.0 access, PPT generation
- **Basic**: $9.90/month, RIE 2.5 engine, 45 reports/month, Word & Email export
- **Professional**: $19.90/month, RIE 3.0 flagship, unlimited generation, full-scene PPT, strategic depth analysis, priority support

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.goreportify.com) - Generate professional AI-powered business reports.
- [Generate Report](https://www.goreportify.com/generate.html) - Upload your data and generate comprehensive AI reports.
- [FAQs](https://www.goreportify.com/faq.html) - Frequently asked questions about Reportify AI.
- [Subscription](https://www.goreportify.com/subscription.html) - Choose your plan.
- [Deep Insights Blog](https://www.goreportify.com/blog.html) - Articles on PM, reporting, and AI automation.
- [Global Tech Radar](https://www.goreportify.com/news.html) - Daily curated tech news.
- [Pricing](https://www.goreportify.com/index.html#pricing) - Reportify AI subscription plans.
- [Contact Support](https://www.goreportify.com/contact.html) - Get in touch with Reportify AI.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.goreportify.com/privacy.html) - Data handling and privacy practices.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.goreportify.com/terms.html) - Terms for using Reportify AI.

## Common Use Cases

- **Project Managers**: Convert weekly standup notes and Jira updates into professional stakeholder reports
- **Product Managers**: Turn meeting notes and user research into executive summaries and status reports
- **Small Business Owners**: Generate daily business reviews and weekly operational reports
- **Freelancers**: Create professional client updates and project progress reports
- **Team Leads**: Automate weekly team status reports and sprint summaries
- **Remote Workers**: Transform chat logs and async updates into formal documentation
